title: Tommy Soeharto’s golf company sets IPO price to IDR 200 per share
body: PT Intra Golflink Resorts Tbk (GOLF), a golf course consultancy and management company of Tommy Soeharto, has decided the initial public offering (IPO) price of IDR 200 per share.

title: MTEL to revise bond and sukuk ijarah target proceeds to IDR 250.22 billion
body: PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk (MTEL) is revising the target of its proceeds of issuance of Bond I and Sukuk Ijarah I of 2024 to IDR 250.22 billion from the initial IDR 500 billion.

title: CGAS to secure credit facility of IDR 53.88 billion
body: PT Citra Nusantara Gemilang Tbk (CGAS) has secured a loan facility of IDR 53.88 billion in total from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: BTPN to issue bond of IDR 355.06 billion, highest coupon set to 7.10%
body: PT Bank Tabungan Negara Tbk (BTPN) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond V Phase I Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 355 billion.

title: Reducing debts, RANC to divest shares
body: PT Supra Boga Lestari Tbk (RANC), the managing company of Ranch Market, is divesting its shares of 40% of PT Mars Multi Mandiri (MMM) to PT Anarawata Puspa Utama (APU) for IDR 145.78 billion.

title: JATI to support Indodax’s crypto business
body: PT Informasi Teknologi Indonesia Tbk (JATI) has successfully expanded business portfolio of its client, Indodax, to cryptocurrency industry. Indodax is a tech company in blockchain and cryptoasset industry.

title: Three insurance companies reported jumbo net profit in Q1 2024
body: Three out of 18 listed insurance companies with market cap of over IDR 3.5 trillion are revealed to score impressive net profit in Q1 2024.

title: Mitra Adiperkasa distributes cash dividend of IDR 132.32 billion
body: PT Mitra Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPI), a retail company that manages several globally-renowned fashion and F&B outlets, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 132.32 billion or IDR 8 per share.

title: Astra Land injects IDR 524.3 billion to Mandarin Oriental Hotel
body: PT Astra Land Indonesia (ALI), the property line of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), has channelled extra capital of IDR 524.3 billion to PT Bhumi Prama Arjasa (BPA).

title: Adaro’s subsidiary obtains affiliate loans of IDR 351.3 billion
body: PT Indoprima Niaga Sejahtera (INS), a subsidiary of PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO), has received a loan facility worth IDR 351.3 billion from PT Alam Tri Abadi (ATA).
